description: Targeted friction rerun with direct STEP artifact semantic inspection after G8 additive-root and multi-hole continuation changes.

cases.remaining_blocker: Additive-root continuation now exports, but base_hole placement is semantically wrong (root interpretation / feature placement mismatch).

step_semantic_inspection.inspection_notes: Two cylindrical cuts exist (r=3.5), but centers are at (11,0,22) and (26,0,22); base_hole intent from offset -15 on base is not preserved.

cases.remaining_blocker: Boolean add chain exports but semantic bracket shape is not preserved (result degenerates to simple box-like solid).

step_semantic_inspection.inspection_notes: Artifact is a valid manifold solid but contains only 6 ADVANCED_FACE entries, indicating box-like output rather than intended bracket composition.

cases.remaining_blocker: Boolean Subtract safe composition still only supports supported analytic holes on bounded safe roots.

step_semantic_inspection.inspection_notes: No STEP artifact: execution stops with BrepBoolean.RebuildResult NotImplemented diagnostic.

cases.remaining_blocker: Box-minus-box pocket subtract remains unrepresentable as a single-box rebuild in current M13 path.

step_semantic_inspection.inspection_notes: No STEP artifact: execution stops with BrepBoolean.RebuildResult representability diagnostic.

next_blocker_after_g8: Export-level success without semantic fidelity (especially additive-root continuation placement/shape correctness) is now the highest-priority blocker class.
